settings.heading: Ready-to-order apparel designs from L F Graphco.
settings.lead: Shop simple shirt designs for gifts, family events, sports parents, bridal parties and Texas pride.
settings.body: Shop Collections are the quick checkout lane for customers who want a design, size and shirt color without requesting a quote. For schools, teams, businesses, churches, municipalities or bulk apparel programs, use the Request Quote path instead.
settings.features: Select Design,Select Size,Select Shirt Color,Optional Personalization,Checkout and Ship

settings.heading: Choose a ready-to-order collection.
settings.intro: These retail collections support easy checkout while custom printing remains the primary L F Graphco service.
